content.text:
### End of section method

The experimental design incorporated three distinct evaluation phases, each targeting a specific capability dimension {{cite_2_1}}. First, we assessed baseline performance on standard benchmarks. Second, we evaluated generalization under distribution shift. Third, we measured robustness to adversarial perturbations {{cite_2_2}}.

These phases collectively provide a comprehensive picture of model behavior across diverse conditions, forming the empirical foundation for the results presented next.

### Start of section results

The results confirm the effectiveness of the proposed approach across all three evaluation phases {{cite_3_1}}. On the primary benchmark, the model achieved state-of-the-art performance, exceeding prior methods by a substantial margin. Robustness evaluations further demonstrated that performance degradation under adversarial conditions remained within acceptable bounds.
